title: Evaluate Collaboration Tools for Peak Performance
description:
In today's hybrid work environment, the right collaboration tools can make or break a team's productivity. This raises the question of how do you move beyond subjective preferences to select tools that genuinely drive performance? This course equips you with a data-driven framework to evaluate and optimize your team's collaboration stack.

You will learn to identify and measure key performance indicators like First Reply Time and Time to Resolution, allowing you to pinpoint and reduce "collaboration latency." Through practical, hands-on modules, you will master the skills to analyze communication data, create compelling visualizations like box plots to compare tool effectiveness, and translate your findings into actionable recommendations. The course culminates in a real-world project where you will analyze performance data from Trello and Jira to build a compelling business case for the best tool.

This course is for team leads, project managers, and operations professionals who want to make informed, objective decisions that boost team efficiency and accelerate project delivery.
